skill.name: fal-generate
skill.description: Guidance for using fal.ai image and video generation models with AI coding assistants.
skill.summary: Plan image and video generation workflows with fal.ai model guidance.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two hardcoded URLs and two weak cryptography patterns. Review found only Markdown metadata, descriptive text, and source repository links in SKILL.md, with no executable code, cryptographic logic, or runtime network requests.

low_findings.title: Documentation Links Flagged as Network Indicators
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL findings at SKILL.md lines 4 and 22 are source repository references. They are Markdown links and do not perform network requests, send data, or execute code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The only detected URLs are static GitHub references in Markdown. No script, API client, or runtime fetch behavior is present.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Alert Is False Positive
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography alerts at SKILL.md lines 3 and 20 occur in plain descriptive text about AI models. No cryptographic algorithm, hashing function, key handling, or encryption code is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines contain prose, not code. The skill has no implementation files where weak cryptographic behavior could occur.

content.value_statement: Teams need clear guidance when using AI models for image and video generation. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code plan fal.ai media generation tasks with focused prompts.
actual_capabilities: Identifies fal.ai image and video generation as the skill focus.
Provides a concise use case for AI-assisted media generation work.
Points users to the upstream source repository for more details.
Works as lightweight guidance for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
Helps frame prompts for generated images and videos.
limitations: Does not include executable fal.ai API integration code.
Does not list specific fal.ai model names or parameters.
Does not handle authentication, billing, or account setup.
Does not provide detailed examples for advanced media pipelines.

use_cases.title: Prototype Visual Concepts
use_cases.description: Create clear prompts for early image concepts before a design review.

use_cases.title: Plan Short Video Assets
use_cases.description: Describe short video ideas for social posts, demos, or campaign tests.

use_cases.title: Draft Media Generation Requests
use_cases.description: Convert rough creative briefs into structured AI media generation instructions.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Simple Image Prompt
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner prompt for one image concept.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use fal-generate to help me write a concise image generation prompt for [subject], with [style], [setting], and [mood].

prompt_templates.title: Refine a Visual Brief
prompt_templates.scenario: Improve an existing concept before generation.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use fal-generate to refine this visual brief for fal.ai: [brief]. Keep the result specific, production ready, and easy to revise.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Short Video Prompt
prompt_templates.scenario: Create a video generation prompt with motion details.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use fal-generate to draft a short video prompt for [scene]. Include camera movement, timing, subject action, and visual style.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Media Prompt Set
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow for multiple related assets.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use fal-generate to create a coordinated prompt set for [campaign or product]. Include image prompts, video prompts, style rules, and revision notes.

output_examples.input: Create a prompt for a product hero image of a smart desk lamp.
output_examples.output: A focused product image prompt with subject details, lighting, setting, material notes, and a clean composition direction.

output_examples.input: Turn a rough launch idea into three video prompt options.
output: A calm product reveal concept with slow camera movement.
A feature-focused concept showing the product in use.
A social teaser concept with fast edits and clear branding cues.

output_examples.input: Improve this image prompt for a design review.
output_examples.output: A revised prompt with clearer style, scene constraints, intended audience, and practical notes for iteration.

best_practices: Provide the subject, style, format, and intended use before asking for prompts.
Ask for separate image and video prompts when the assets need different motion or framing.
Review generated prompts for brand, legal, and platform requirements before production use.
anti_patterns: Do not expect this skill to call fal.ai APIs or manage credentials.
Do not use vague prompts when the output needs a precise style or layout.
Do not rely on generated media prompts without human review for sensitive campaigns.

faq.question: Does this skill generate images directly?
faq.answer: No. It provides guidance for creating prompts and workflows for fal.ai media generation.

faq.question: Does it include fal.ai API code?
faq.answer: No. The skill file contains guidance only and no executable API integration.

faq.question: Can I use it with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: What media types does it cover?
faq.answer: It focuses on image and video generation workflows.

faq.question: Does it choose specific fal.ai models?
faq.answer: No. The skill does not include model selection details or parameter tables.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file contains Markdown guidance and source links, with no confirmed security issues.
